title: Ambulatory Recordings of Wireless Bladder and Colon Devices in Pigs
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"54ure","text":"This protocol is for collecting ambulatory, wireless data from a coloMOCA impantled into a pig colon.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"43lg2","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Place BluMOCA receiver radio into pocket on the pig jacket.
Wake the coloMOCA with the waker set between 9V-15V, 1.5A.
Plug the Bluetooth dongle into the computer.
Record from ColoMOCA using LabVIEW software; take notes about pig movement, eating, bowl movement etc.
creator: Brett Hanzlicek
